info.name: Project & Task Management API
info.description:
RESTful API for a Project & Task Management System.

Base URL: {{baseUrl}}
Auth: Bearer {{token}}

## Auth Flow
1. Call `Auth / Register` to create a user.
2. Call `Auth / Login` to obtain a JWT `access_token`.
3. The token is stored in the `token` environment variable automatically and used by all protected requests.

variable.description: API base URL. Use http://localhost:3000/api/v1 for local or Docker runs.
JWT access token. Set automatically by the Auth/Login request test script.
Last created/referenced project ID. Set automatically by Projects scripts.
Last created/referenced task ID. Set automatically by Tasks scripts.

request.description: Returns service and database connectivity status. No auth required.
